name: Signal Handler with Functionality that is not Asynchronous-Safe
description: The product defines a signal handler that contains code which is not asynchronous-safe, such as calling non-reentrant functions or accessing shared global state, which can corrupt system state and lead to denial of service or code execution.
detection_pattern: CONTROL[signal_handler] invokes TRANSFORM[non_reentrant_function] (like malloc, printf) or accesses STORAGE[global_state] without CONTROL[async_safety_guard] ensuring all operations within the handler are reentrant and atomic
